query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'chat_sessions' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2mYfLk323U3DU3o.a211c2f19edd --database beXrKFV66UQLVsECzVvhH4 --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'chat_sessions' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	COLUMN_TYPE
id	int	int
sessionId	varchar	varchar(64)
userId	int	int
presentationId	varchar	varchar(64)
phase	varchar	varchar(64)
messages	json	json
topic	varchar	varchar(512)
createdAt	timestamp	timestamp
updatedAt	timestamp	timestamp
mode	varchar	varchar(32)
metadata	json	json
